narrative:
08 congressional district has 538,466 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.8% D−R vs -19.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
